# Case request-position: Step 1

## Changed Files
- file.js

## Asset Files
- Bundle: bundle.js
- Bundle: lib_a_js.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 87
- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 1242

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main"],"r":[],"m":["./lib lazy recursive ^\\.\\/.*\\.js$ referencedExports: a"]}
```


## Update


### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./file.js
- ./lib lazy recursive ^\.\/.*\.js$

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {
"./file.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) {
"use strict";
__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);
__webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {
  fn: () => (fn)
});
const fn = async function () {
  const name = "a";
  const wrap = v => v;
  return wrap((await __webpack_require__("./lib lazy recursive ^\\.\\/.*\\.js$")(`./${name}.js`)));
}


},
"./lib lazy recursive ^\\.\\/.*\\.js$"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
var map = {
  "./a.js": [
    "./lib/a.js",
    [
      "lib_a_js"
    ]
  ]
};
function __rspack_async_context(req) {
  if(!__webpack_require__.o(map, req)) {
    return Promise.resolve().then(() => {
var e = new Error("Cannot find module '" + req + "'");
e.code = 'MODULE_NOT_FOUND';
throw e;
});
  }

  var ids = map[req], id = ids[0];
  return __webpack_require__.e(ids[1][0]).then(() => (__webpack_require__(id)));
}

__rspack_async_context.keys = () => (Object.keys(map));
__rspack_async_context.id = "./lib lazy recursive ^\\.\\/.*\\.js$";
module.exports = __rspack_async_context;


},

},function(__webpack_require__) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__webpack_require__.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```
